title: Session 14 — The Grove
bodyText:
# What happened
Recovery: **[[pc-eddy|Eddy]] took the cursed sword**; a small **burial for [[pc-trunks|Trunks]]**; the horned figure's remains were wisely **burned**. **[[cumb]] was let out of the bag** (deal: roam by day, bag at night — after heated words about broken promises). **[[michael-myconid]]** the myconid guided them to the **grove gates**, where at the heart of a breathing mushroom-forest amphitheater they met **[[kennarea|Kennarea]] (Kena)** — the vine-limbed drow druid. She apologized for sealing the grove mid-battle; after [[pc-brolin|Brolin]]'s persuasion she let Michael stay with the party and gave them rest.

Downriver, past nets over phosphorescent water, they found a ramshackle laboratory-hut strewn with blood and bones — and met **[[eira-cavernborn|Eira]]**, a manic, lonely young dwarf **necromancer** (her rat Gerald "isn't much of a conversationalist"). Morning brought unease: **Brolin's magic was faltering**. Swapping stories, they discovered **Eira and [[pc-felson|Felson]] share the surname Cavernborn.**
